summary: Added non-blocking Claude review workflow for pull requests.
policy_result: No contents write permission, deployment automation, runtime application code, MCP implementation, automatic merge, or automatic push.
risk_result: Medium risk because this introduces live AI review when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is configured; constrained to non-blocking review-only behavior.
unresolved_risks: Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY repository secret for live Claude execution.
Provider availability and API cost are external dependencies.
